caption: A man with a shaved head and a dark beard sits in a studio before a wall of grey acoustic foam panels. He wears black over-ear headphones and a white t-shirt, with tattoos visible on his right arm. A silver professional microphone is positioned in front of him, held by a black boom arm. Text on the arm reads "Blue Microphones". Across the sequence, the man is speaking into the microphone, his expression shifting from a slight smile with his eyes narrowed to a more neutral, focused look as he continues to talk. His head moves slightly, and his lips move as he speaks, while the background and equipment remain stationary.
